name: the-gleaning-ground
description: Gleaning Ground ministry website for Netlify with Decap CMS.

scripts.prepare-site: rm -rf src _site && cat .source/chunks/00 .source/chunks/01 .source/chunks/02 .source/chunks/03 .source/chunks/04a .source/chunks/04b | base64 -d | tar -xz && node scripts/overlay-content.mjs
scripts.build: npm run prepare-site && eleventy && npm run install-divine-blueprint
